notes: metabolic_vascular is deliberately omitted from this file for the leave-one-out taxonomy-discovery eval. See holdout_eval.json for its full definition and grading criteria.

anti_amyloid_immunotherapy.description: Monoclonal antibodies and immunotherapies targeting amyloid-beta for clearance
anti_amyloid_immunotherapy.pubmed_query: ("amyloid beta"[tiab] OR "amyloid beta"[MeSH Terms]) AND (antibody[tiab] OR immunotherapy[tiab] OR "monoclonal antibody"[tiab])

amyloid_production.description: Agents targeting amyloid precursor protein processing enzymes (secretase pathway)
amyloid_production.pubmed_query: ("BACE1"[tiab] OR "beta secretase"[tiab] OR "gamma secretase"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

tau_targeted.description: Antibodies, ASOs, and small molecules targeting tau pathology
tau_targeted.pubmed_query: tau[tiab] AND (antibody[tiab] OR aggregation[tiab] OR phosphorylation[tiab] OR "antisense oligonucleotide"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

neuroinflammation_microglia_complement.description: Agents modulating microglial activation, complement cascade, or innate immune signaling
neuroinflammation_microglia_complement.pubmed_query: (microglia[tiab] OR neuroinflammation[tiab] OR TREM2[tiab] OR complement[tiab] OR NLRP3[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

apoe_lipid_metabolism.pubmed_query: APOE[tiab] AND (lipid[tiab] OR cholesterol[tiab] OR "gene therapy"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

synaptic_neurotransmitter.description: Symptomatic and synaptic-density-targeted agents affecting neurotransmission
synaptic_neurotransmitter.pubmed_query: ("synaptic density"[tiab] OR cholinergic[tiab] OR NMDA[tiab] OR acetylcholinesterase[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

regenerative_neurotrophic.pubmed_query: (NGF[tiab] OR BDNF[tiab] OR neurotrophic[tiab] OR "stem cell"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

metabolic_insulin_glucose_signaling.description: Agents targeting brain insulin resistance, glucose hypometabolism, and incretin (GLP-1) signaling pathways implicated in AD pathogenesis, including insulin sensitizers, incretin mimetics, and intranasal insulin
metabolic_insulin_glucose_signaling.pubmed_query: ("insulin resistance"[tiab] OR "GLP-1"[tiab] OR incretin[tiab] OR "glucose metabolism"[tiab] OR "PPAR-gamma"[tiab] OR "intranasal insulin"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

ketone_metabolic_substrate.description: Medium-chain triglyceride, ketone ester, and ketogenic dietary interventions providing an alternative brain energy substrate to compensate for cerebral glucose hypometabolism in AD
ketone_metabolic_substrate.pubmed_query: ("ketone bodies"[tiab] OR "medium-chain triglyceride"[tiab] OR "ketogenic diet"[tiab] OR tricaprilin[tiab] OR "ketone ester"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

senolytic_cellular_senescence.description: Senolytic agents targeting clearance of senescent cells as a modifiable driver of AD-associated neurodegeneration and inflammation
senolytic_cellular_senescence.pubmed_query: (senolytic[tiab] OR "cellular senescence"[tiab] OR (dasatinib[tiab] AND quercetin[tiab])) AND Alzheimer[tiab]

pde9_cgmp_signaling.description: Phosphodiesterase-9A (PDE9A) inhibitors targeting cGMP/PKG signaling to enhance synaptic plasticity and cognition in AD
pde9_cgmp_signaling.pubmed_query: ("PDE9"[tiab] OR "phosphodiesterase 9"[tiab] OR "cGMP"[tiab]) AND Alzheimer[tiab] AND (inhibitor[tiab] OR cognitive[tiab])

unclassified.description: Catch-all for items that do not match any defined bucket. Not a real mechanism category - this is the routing target for the curator agent's taxonomy-discovery review.
